home.title: Home
home.install_ios_hint: To install the app, tap the share icon at the bottom and then select 'Add to Home Screen'.
home.open_app: Please close your browser now and open the app.
home.reminder_weekly: Please remember to do the weekly survey.
home.reminder_export: Please remember to export your data one final time.
home.deinstall_app: You have completed all the tasks in the App. You will receive all further instructions via e-mail. You can deinstall the app now.

mic.title: Microphone access required
mic.info:
For some tests, we need to record your voice, which requires access to your microphone.
Please allow access to continue.

alerts.unlimited: For the sake of the demo, please pretend you would like to select unlimited duration.
alerts.skip: For the sake of the demo, please pretend you would like to skip the assessment.
alerts.finish: For the sake of the demo, please pretend you would like to finish the assessment.
alerts.matching_first: In this example you have to press the button in the upper right corner with the + on it.

instructions.startButton1: Let‘s pretend you just received a text message
instructions.startButton2: A button would be visible for the next half hour
instructions.startButton3: Click on it to start the assessment
instructions.microphone1: Some of the tests require audio recordings
instructions.microphone2: Depending on your device, you might be asked to allow microphone access
instructions.microphone3: Whenever your audio is recorded, you will see a microphone icon in the top middle of the screen
instructions.selectDuration1: In the beginning of each assessment you can select the maximal duration.
instructions.selectDuration2: The assessment will automatically end after this time
instructions.selectDuration3: Please always select the duration according to your current fatigue
instructions.preQuestions1: The first questions concern your current fatigue and cognitive state
instructions.preQuestions2: You will be asked to rate symptoms or your agreement with statements on a scale with numbers
instructions.preQuestions3: For now you can put in any answer you like
instructions.cognitiveTestsIntro1: There are three cognitive tests in the daily assessments.
instructions.matchingIntro1: In this Guide the first test will be “selecting symbols”
instructions.matchingExample1: Press on the button with the symbol matching the number
instructions.matchingExplain1: Your aim is to get <strong>as many correct answers as possible<strong>
instructions.matchingExplain2: Let’s try it for 30 seconds today
instructions.matchingExplain3: From tomorrow on the test will look exactly the same, but take 2 minutes.
instructions.stroopExplain1: You will see color-words printed in a different color
instructions.stroopExplain2: Your task is to say the color the word is printed in
instructions.stroopExplain3: You are not supposed to read the word
instructions.stroopExplain4: You can speak when there is a microphone in the top middle of the screen
instructions.stroopExplain8: Your aim is to get as many correct answers as possible
instructions.stroopExplain9: Let’s try it for 30 seconds today
instructions.stroopExplain10: From tomorrow on the test will look exactly the same, but take 2 minutes
instructions.microphoneHint: Depending on your device, you might now be asked to allow microphone access. Otherwise click on 'next'
instructions.memoryExplain1: A list of words will be shown to you one after another
instructions.memoryExplain3: In the end you will be asked to say as many out loud as you can
instructions.memoryExplain4: Let‘s try it out with 5 words
instructions.memoryExplain5: The words were Moon, Banana, Butterfly, Farmer, Pen
instructions.memoryExplain6: It is not important in which order you say them
instructions.memoryExplain7: From tomorrow on they will be nine words
instructions.memoryExplain8: Don't worry if you do not remember all of them. That is very normal
instructions.cognitiveTestsOutro1: These three tests will always appear in a different order.
instructions.physicalSymptoms1: Next you will be asked to rate your current symptoms
instructions.physicalSymptoms2: If you do not experience one of the proposed symptoms, you can rate it with 0
instructions.physicalSymptoms3: Please add symptoms you experience right now that were not already covered by other questions
instructions.physicalSymptoms4: You can change the list of proposed symptoms in the app at any time
instructions.activities1: Next you will be asked about the activities you have performed the last assessment
instructions.activities2: You will be asked if they were mentally or physically exhausting
instructions.activities3: This depends entirely on your personal perception and can also change from day to day
instructions.activities4: For example, cooking might be not exhausting at all, or physically exhausting, or mentally exhausting or both
instructions.activities5: You will also be asked if the activities were mandatory or leisures activitites
instructions.activities6: Mandatory means you do it because you have to (e.g. work, houswork, studies, doctor appointments)
instructions.activities7: Leisure activities are activities you do for fun (e.g. meeting friends, hobbies)
instructions.postQuestions1: Now go through the next questions to see if everything is clear to you
instructions.postQuestions2: At the end you will be asked about your fatigue again to see if it has changed
instructions.evaluateLastTest1: On the very last page you will be asked to reflect about how the assessment before this one affected you
instructions.export1: Whenever you collected new data an export button will appear in the app
instructions.export2: If you click on it, all new data is sent to the study team
instructions.export5: You can decide yourself when you want to upload your data
instructions.export6: You should export your data at least once at the end of the study.
instructions.almostDone1: Before we finish this tutorial we want to show you two more functions
instructions.skip1: If you feel like it is necessary, you can entirely skip an assessment.
instructions.finish1: You can also stop in the middle of an assessment, if you feel like it is necessary.
instructions.finish2: Try it out by clicking on the door in the upper right corner.
instructions.demoDone1: Now you are done with the tutorial for today
instructions.demoDone2: If you have any questions before the tests start tomorrow, feel free to send an e-mail to <email>{{ addr }}</email>

phoneNumber.instruction: Please type in the phone number of the device you are using right now.
phoneNumber.label: Phone Number

phoneNumberCheck.instruction: You should receive a text message with a code. This can take up to 1 minute. Please type in the code you received below. If you do not receive any message in more than a minute, please check the phone number you have typed in on the previous page.
phoneNumberCheck.label: Code
phoneNumberCheck.attempts_error: You have only {{attempts_maximum}} attempts to type in the correct phone number. You have {{attempts_left}} attempts left.
phoneNumberCheck.no_attempts_left: You have reached the maximum number of attempts. Please contact the study team if you would like to continue with the study.

symptoms.title: Symptoms
symptoms.questionMC: Did you experience any of the following symptoms in the past 4 weeks?
symptoms.questionOther: Please name any additional symptoms you experienced in the past 4 weeks that were not in the list.
symptoms.hint: Symptoms shown in lighter text will be excluded from your daily test surveys.

screens.installation_finished: You are now done setting up the app. Tomorrow the button for the guide will appear here.

exit.end_question: Do you really want to end the survey?

help.title: Problems or questions?
help.text: Please send an e-mail to the study team. We will try to answer as fast as possible.

fatigue.title: Fatigue
fatigue.question: How much fatigue do you feel right now?

end.title: End of test
end.headline: Thank you for your participation!
end.text:
We sincerely thank you for your help.
Your answers have been saved.
end.timesup: The {{ duration }} minutes are now up.

no_test_previous.title: No test last time
no_test_previous.question: You did not take the test {{ day }}  at {{ time }}. What was the reason?
no_test_previous.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
no_test_previous.answer_wrong: That's not correct. I fully completed the test.

energy.question: The last survey should have been...
energy.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.

pem.question: Did the last survey trigger PEM for you?
pem.answer_unsure_relation: I had PEM, but I don't know if it was related to the last survey.
pem.answer_no_response: I don't know. / I don't want to answer.

no_test_now.title: No test now
no_test_now.question: Why can't you take the test right now?
no_test_now.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.

duration.title: Duration
duration.question: How many minutes of survey do you have energy for now?
duration.hint: The survey will stop after this time (+- 30 seconds).
duration.no_time: I can't do the survey right now.

symptoms.title: Symptoms
symptoms.question: How strongly are you currently experiencing the following symptoms?

memory.title: Remembering words
memory.introduction:
Please memorize the following words carefully.

Afterwards, list all the words you remember.

memory_repeat.title: Memory Repeat
memory_repeat.introduction: Once you are ready, press 'Start recording'.
memory_repeat.recording_hint: Please name all the words you remember.
memory_repeat.recording_confirm_hint:
Are you really finished?
Then you can press 'Done' again.

Otherwise, list any remaining words you remember.

matching.title: Selecting Symbols
matching.introduction: Please match the following symbols and numbers.

stroop.title: Naming Colors
stroop.introduction: Please name the color out loud.
stroop.timesup_text: The recording has been completed and saved.

sleep.question1: How long did you sleep last night?
sleep.question2: How was your sleep last night?

activities_must.question: What have you done since the last survey?
activities_must.title: Mandatory activity/activities that...

activities_free.question: What have you done since the last survey?
activities_free.title: Leisure activities that...

activities_recovery.question: What have you done to recover since the last survey?

substances.question: Have you consumed any of the following substances in the last 4 hours?

symptoms.title: Physical symptoms
symptoms.question: How strongly are you currently experiencing the following symptoms?

mood.question: How strongly are you currently experiencing the following emotions?

questions.one: Physically, I feel able to do only a little.
questions.two: When I do something, I can concentrate well on it.
questions.three: Physically, I trust myself to do a lot.
questions.five: It takes great effort for me to concentrate on things.
questions.six: Physically, I feel in poor condition.
questions.eight: Physically, I feel in excellent condition.

work.questionTotal: How many hours did you work/study/attend education etc. in total last week?
work.questionHome: How many of these hours did you work in home office?
work.hint: Please also exclude extra jobs and overtime.
options: I don't know / I don't want to answer.

ill.hint: Aside from your post-COVID complaints, e.g., a flu, or gastrointestinal infection.
optionsOverall: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
ill.no_answer: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
ill.questionDays: On which days were you sick?

mens.questionOverall: Have you had your menstruation in the last week? (period)
optionsOverall: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
mens.no_answer: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
mens.questionDays: On which days in the last week did you have your menstruation? (period)
